results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end

summary: FOMC held rates at 3.5%-3.75% on Apr 29, 2026. 8-4 vote (four dissenters — most since Oct 1992). Inflation elevated partly due to global energy prices. Powell remains on board; Kevin Warsh nominated as next chair. Markets pricing no changes rest of 2026 and well into 2027.
